notes: Mines the AIDev dataset (1,664 merged agent-generated PRs from 197 OSS projects) to characterize deleted methods via AST diffing and refactoring detection, applies Mann-Whitney U / Cliff's delta statistical tests, then trains and evaluates a Random Forest deletion-prediction model against random and GPT-4o baselines. No human participants; GPT-4o is an automated baseline, not human-subjects data.
